name: Forklift accident at work crushed my leg, how much could my case be worth?
description: $120k+ for fractures, millions for amputations/brain damage. Depends on injury proof.

mainEntity.name: Forklift accident at work crushed my leg, how much could my case be worth?

acceptedAnswer.text: $120k+ for fractures, millions for amputations/brain damage. Depends on injury proof.
acceptedAnswer.description: Settlements range $120k-$20M depending on injury severity, lost wages, and pain; Utah averages $50k-$200k for serious cases.[1][2] Context: Workers' comp covers basics; third-party adds pain/suffering. Key factors: Permanent disability, future care, OSHA violations boost value. Practical guidance: Get independent medical exam; lawyer negotiates liens. Values vary by specifics.
